requirement_topic.en: OCPP Networking, Load Management, and IEC 61000 EMC

summary.en: Lesotho has no confirmed national EV charging back-office platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed as of 2026-06-14. For public, semi-public, fleet, or paid charging, OCPP is the practical international protocol for charger-to-back-office communication and is likely to be required by the site owner, charge-point operator, fleet platform, or funder. Because Lesotho's grid is relatively small and import-dependent, networked chargers should support remote monitoring, fault reporting, metering, access control, and load management. As grid-connected electrical equipment, chargers should also provide IEC 61000-series EMC evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, and power quality at the point of common coupling.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，莱索托尚无相当于卡塔尔Tarsheed的国家电动汽车充电后台平台。对于公共、半公共、车队或付费充电，OCPP是充电桩与后台通信的实务国际协议，可能由场地方、充电点运营商、车队平台或出资方要求。由于莱索托电网规模较小且依赖进口电力，联网充电桩应支持远程监控、故障报告、计量、访问控制和负载管理。作为并网电气设备，充电桩还应提供IEC 61000系列EMC证据，覆盖公共连接点处的发射、抗扰度、谐波和电能质量。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，賴索托尚無相當於卡塔爾Tarsheed的國家電動汽車充電後台平台。對於公共、半公共、車隊或付費充電，OCPP是充電樁與後台通訊的實務國際協議，可能由場地方、充電點運營商、車隊平台或出資方要求。由於賴索托電網規模較小且依賴進口電力，聯網充電樁應支持遠程監控、故障報告、計量、訪問控制和負載管理。作為併網電氣設備，充電樁還應提供IEC 61000系列EMC證據，覆蓋公共連接點處的發射、抗擾度、諧波和電能質量。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — international standardisation context for OCPP adoption
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonic current emissions, voltage fluctuations, and immunity
LEC power-quality and load-management requirements where specified
LEWA regulatory conditions for commercial electricity service where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is a CAN bus vehicle-side protocol and is not a substitute for OCPP back-office communication or CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication. China chargers may support proprietary back-office protocols; those implementations must be mapped to the OCPP version and cybersecurity settings required by the Lesotho project or operator.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信。GB/T 27930是车辆侧CAN总线协议，不能替代OCPP后台通信，也不能替代CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信。中国充电桩可能支持私有后台协议；这些实现须映射到莱索托项目或运营商要求的OCPP版本和网络安全设置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊。GB/T 27930是車輛側CAN總線協議，不能替代OCPP後台通訊，也不能替代CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊。中國充電樁可能支持私有後台協議；這些實現須映射到賴索托項目或運營商要求的OCPP版本和網絡安全設置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, SIM / Ethernet / Wi-Fi connectivity, payment or RFID requirements, remote diagnostics, data retention, cybersecurity settings, and load-management behaviour required by the site owner or operator. For DC CCS2 stations, GB/T 27930 must be replaced or supplemented by IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required. EMC files should include IEC 61000 emissions, immunity, harmonics, voltage fluctuation, and power-quality data suitable for LEC review. A charger with GB/T 27930 only and no OCPP implementation is not network-ready for public or fleet charging in Lesotho.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认场地方或运营商要求的OCPP版本、SIM / 以太网 / Wi-Fi连接、支付或RFID要求、远程诊断、数据保存、网络安全设置和负载管理行为。对于CCS2直流站，须在要求时用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118替换或补充GB/T 27930。EMC文件应包括适合LEC审查的IEC 61000发射、抗扰度、谐波、电压波动和电能质量数据。仅支持GB/T 27930且无OCPP实现的充电桩不具备莱索托公共或车队充电联网条件。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認場地方或運營商要求的OCPP版本、SIM / 以太網 / Wi-Fi連接、支付或RFID要求、遠程診斷、數據保存、網絡安全設置和負載管理行為。對於CCS2直流站，須在要求時用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118替換或補充GB/T 27930。EMC文件應包括適合LEC審查的IEC 61000發射、抗擾度、諧波、電壓波動和電能質量數據。僅支持GB/T 27930且無OCPP實現的充電樁不具備賴索托公共或車隊充電聯網條件。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where required by a public, fleet, CPO, donor, or site-owner specification; IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence can be required by LEC or project review for grid-connected chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-side communication protocol; it is not an OCPP back-office substitute and not a CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lesotho has no confirmed national EV charging platform, but public and fleet chargers should be OCPP-ready and carry IEC 61000 EMC evidence. GB/T 27930-only DC communication is not enough for CCS2 or networked charger operation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莱索托尚无已确认的国家电动汽车充电平台，但公共和车队充电桩应具备OCPP能力并提供IEC 61000 EMC证据。仅有GB/T 27930直流通信不足以支持CCS2或联网充电桩运营。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 賴索托尚無已確認的國家電動汽車充電平台，但公共和車隊充電樁應具備OCPP能力並提供IEC 61000 EMC證據。僅有GB/T 27930直流通訊不足以支持CCS2或聯網充電樁運營。
